human_name: Rocket Market Map AI update contract
guidance: If an AI updates payload, cadence, maturity, funding or first-flight data, it should update the matching node by id.
If an AI updates valuation or investors, it should also update the matching company record in companies.
The website consumes the route_class and derived explainers already present in the JSON. If strategy changes materially, update route_class plus route_why/constraint/watch fields.
Keep values machine-readable first; keep human-readable display fields in sync.
